Sent: Wednesday, 26 November 2025 11:53 AM
To: ops@slroceantankers.com
Cc: ind-pvt@atlanticglobalshipping.com; haven@stationsatcommail.com
Subject: (T-INHAL112528665) MT HAVEN - VOY NO. - (DISCHARGE - LINEAR ALKYL
BENZENE (LAB)) DUE AT PORT HALDIA- BERTHING UPDATES
 


Reference: AGS/T-INHAL112528665/OPS-LIQ/SAPR/10/2025
Date: 26-11-2025 
From: Atlantic Global Shipping Pvt. Ltd. - HO Mumbai, India. 

Port HALDIA

Good day Sir,
 
Sub vessel ETA for Port Haldia 03/12-PM HRS for discharging her nominated
cargo - LAB 
 
Please find attached berthing Line up for HD-6/HD-7 where vessel is expected
to berth for Discharge the Cargo.

AGW, sub vessel is expected to berth on 04-05/12 subject to sailing of
earlier arrived vessels, terminal confirmation & as per tide .
 
NOTE: As per norms discharge rate 328 MT per hour to be maintain for LAB to
avoid additional berth hire charges.
Vessel seniority for berthing consider as per vessel arrival and submitting
all the documents including cargo discharge instruction before port berthing
meeting i.e 1000 hrs LT
 
NOTE: :   PLEASE NOTE THIS ABOVE BERTHING LINE UP IS TENTATIVE & SUBJECT TO
CHANGE AS PER ARRIVAL  OF THE VESSEL, DRAFT, SPEED AND AVAILIBILITY OF BERTH
/ PILOT. 
 
The above is for your kind information and please be guided accordingly.
 
Please note that HD-5,6 and HD-07 are at inside docks area and all movements
will be during high tide only.
 
Kindly note during one tide only 3 vessel can come in and 2 vessel can go
out of the docks area, so even if the vessel is ready to sail out, sailing
will be as per the seniority for sailing readiness, therefore sailing out
from docks is subject to availability of sailing slot as per the sailing
turn, it is common that the vessel are waiting around 2-3 days at inside
docks due to non availability of sailing slot.
 
In Case of Severe congestion Port might opt for vessel to undergo cargo
operation  double banking Mode, Please be noted that if vessel completes the
discharge operation and sailing slot is not available the port might opt for
double banking operation of your good vessel with another vessel till the
sailing slot is available.
 
This is for your kind information and please be guided accordingly.  
  


 
Thanks & regards,
MR. SAGAR PEVEKAR - SR. EXECUTIVE
Atlantic Global Shipping Pvt. Ltd. - As Agents Only
